apiBaseNote: Set this to your deployed Cloudflare Worker URL, e.g. https://marketmind-api.yoursubdomain.workers.dev — see SETUP_GUIDE.md. Leave blank to keep using static snapshot data only.

fx.note: Called directly from the browser — free, no key needed.

market_prices.note: Key lives as a Cloudflare Worker secret, never in this public file. See SETUP_GUIDE.md.

macro.note: Key lives as a Cloudflare Worker secret, never in this public file. See SETUP_GUIDE.md.

news.note: Fetched and parsed by the Worker, no key needed.
